zh.lifeSummary: First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull於大約1600年出生在英國。她於大約1619年與Rev. Joseph Hull在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1632年享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: First
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: wife
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, borne, according to legend, by a figure who gave her name to the River Liffey.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Rev.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin vocabulary word meaning ‘king’. This was not used as a personal name in Latin of the classical or Christian periods, and its adoption as a given name seems to have been a 19th-century innovation. Its popularity was increased by the fame of the British actor  Rex Harrison  (  1908–90 ), who was christened  Reginald Carey .

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Hull
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name for someone who lived on or near a hill (Old English hyll). As a first name it may in part represent a short form of Hilton .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull was born about 1600, in England. She married Rev. Joseph Hull about 1619, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 1632, at the age of 34, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull est née environ 1600, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Rev. Joseph Hull environ 1619, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1632, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull wurde um 1600 in England geboren. Sie hat um 1619 in England Rev. Joseph Hull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1632 im Alter von 34 Jahren und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull è nata il circa 1600 nel England. Lei sposato Rev. Joseph Hull circa 1619, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1632, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: First wife of Rev. Joseph Hullは約1600年にイギリスで生まれた。約1619年にイギリスでRev. Joseph Hullと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1632年に34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull(은)는 대략 1600년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1619년 영국에서 Rev. Joseph Hull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1632년 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull nasceu aproximadamente 1600, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Rev. Joseph Hull aproximadamente 1619, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1632, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: First wife of Rev. Joseph Hull родилась около 1600 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rev. Joseph Hull около 1619 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 1632 г. в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
